title: StatefulSets, DaemonSets, Jobs, CronJobs, and Controller Selection · Platform-System Defense
summary: A release review compares fresh statefulsets, daemonsets, jobs, cronjobs, and controller selection choices and accepts only answers tied to observable API, controller, workload, network, storage, or policy evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for controller selection and completion contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design StatefulSet ordinal identity, headless discovery, stable claims, ordering, update partition, scaling, and failure recovery around application guarantees.
Use DaemonSets for node-local facilities with selectors, tolerations, priority, rolling updates, resource bounds, and control-plane coverage decisions.
Model Job completions, parallelism, indexed work, retries, backoff, deadlines, success policy, duplicate execution, and cleanup.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz K8s Statefulset Identity Storage
steps.instruction:
Order the K8s Statefulset Identity Storage orchestration evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz K8s Statefulset Identity Storage, keep K8s Statefulset Identity Storage connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A quiz platform runs a durable database as a Deployment, a node log agent as one replica, and a finite migration as a long-running Pod. Choose Deployment, StatefulSet, DaemonSet, Job, or CronJob from identity, placement, completion, concurrency, and retry contracts. Competency probe: Design StatefulSet ordinal identity, headless discovery, stable claims, ordering, update partition, scaling, and failure recovery around application guarantees.
